ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feats" (
  "feat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feat */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the feat */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source where the feat is published */,
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rarity of the feat */,
  "trait_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of trait IDs associated with the feat */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level at which the feat can be taken */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required to take the feat */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Description of the benefits provided by the feat */,
  "spoilers" TEXT /* Indication whether the feat has spoilers (e.g., —, Yes, No) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the feat */,
  "class_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of class IDs that can take the feat */,
  "required_ancestry_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of ancestry IDs required to take the feat */,
  "required_ability_scores" TEXT /* JSON object specifying required ability scores */,
  "required_proficiencies" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of required proficiencies */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of required skills */,
  "required_spells" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of required spells */,
  "required_achievements" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of required achievements */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feat is hidden */,
  "is_restricted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feat is restricted to certain user roles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feat was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feat was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feats_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feats_rarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("rarity_id") REFERENCES rarities ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Core Rulebook, Pathfinder #153) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the source */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was published */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the source is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rarities" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rarity level */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity (e.g., Common, Uncommon) */,
  "rarity_description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity level */,
  "is_special" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rarity is special */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rarity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rarity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait (e.g., Archetype, Monk, Rogue) */,
  "trait_description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the trait */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the trait is required for certain feats */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trait was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trait was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game master, player, content creator) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "feat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feat being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feat */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feat was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, search, filter) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the feat */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_feat_id FOREIGN KEY ("feat_id") REFERENCES feats ("feat_id")
)
